description: Integration: Entity-scoped folder CRUD — create folders for two different clients with same path, verify both exist and are isolated
Integration: Unique constraint rejects duplicate folder_path for same entity_id + entity_type
Integration: getFolderTree(entityId, entityType) returns only that entity's folders; getFolderTree() without params returns only global folders
Integration: toggleDocumentVisibility() bulk-toggles is_client_visible for multiple document IDs in both directions
Integration: toggleFolderVisibility() with cascade=true propagates visibility to contained documents; cascade=false leaves documents unchanged
Integration: Existing global folders (entity_id IS NULL) continue working after migration — CRUD, document listing, tree rendering
Component: Documents component in entity mode renders FolderTreeView sidebar with visibility indicators
Component: Visibility toggle (eye icon) renders in MSP context, hidden in client portal context
Integration: Folder template CRUD lifecycle — create template with items, get with items, update, delete (cascade deletes items)
Integration: setDefaultTemplate() marks template as default, unsets previous default for same entity type; partial unique index prevents two defaults
Integration: ensureEntityFolders() applies default template on first access, creates entity-scoped folders with correct visibility; idempotent on second call (no duplicate folders)
Integration: ensureEntityFolders() is a no-op when no default template exists for entity type
Integration: uploadDocument() auto-files ticket attachment into matching entity folder; succeeds with folder_path=null if no matching folder exists
Component: FolderTemplateEditor renders tree with add/remove folders, drag-and-drop reorder, per-folder visibility toggles
Integration: getClientDocuments() returns only documents with is_client_visible=true associated with authenticated client; excludes non-visible and other clients' docs
Integration: getClientDocuments() aggregates documents across direct client associations, client's tickets, client's project tasks, and client's contracts
Security: Client A's getClientDocuments() never returns client B's documents — verified with two test clients sharing a tenant
Integration: downloadClientDocument() returns 403 for non-visible document and for document belonging to different client
Integration: File view API route returns 403 for client user accessing document with is_client_visible=false; allows access to visible contract-associated docs
E2E: Ticket detail page inline documents section shows all attached documents regardless of is_client_visible flag (regression)
Component: ClientDocumentsPage renders folder tree (read-only), document cards (view/download only, no edit/delete), and filter bar
Integration: createShareLink() generates unique 256-bit token, hashes password for password_protected type, stores expiry and max_downloads
Integration: validateShareToken() returns document data for valid token; rejects revoked, expired, and over-limit tokens with appropriate errors
Integration: GET /api/share/[token] serves file without auth for valid public share; returns 404 for invalid token
Integration: Password-protected share route rejects wrong password (401), serves file with correct password
Integration: Portal-authenticated share route returns 401 without session; serves file with valid portal session that has client access
Integration: Share route increments download_count and creates access log entry with IP and user_agent on each successful access
Integration: revokeShareLink() soft-revokes link; subsequent validateShareToken() rejects it; GET /api/share/[token] returns 410
Component: ShareLinkDialog renders share type selector, password input, expiry picker; generates URL with copy button; lists existing links with revoke action
Component: Public share landing page renders document info and download button; shows password input for password-protected links
Integration: createArticle() creates both document and kb_articles record in transaction; rolls back both if either insert fails
Integration: publishArticle() with audience='client' sets is_client_visible=true on parent document; audience='internal' does NOT set it
Integration: archiveArticle() sets status='archived' and clears is_client_visible on parent document
Integration: Full publishing workflow — draft → submitForReview → completeReview(approved) → publish → archive — all state transitions verified
Integration: getArticles() correctly filters by audience, status, and article_type independently and combined
Integration: getStaleArticles() returns only published articles where next_review_due < NOW(); excludes draft/archived
Integration: recordArticleView() increments view_count; recordArticleFeedback() increments helpful_count or not_helpful_count correctly
Security: Client portal KB query returns only published client-audience articles; excludes internal, draft, and in_review articles
Security: Tenant A cannot see tenant B's KB articles (RLS enforced)
Component: KBArticleEditor wraps DocumentEditor with KB metadata sidebar (audience, type, category, review cycle)
Component: KBPublishingControls renders correct transition buttons based on current article status
E2E: Create entity-scoped folders for a client, upload a document, toggle visibility, verify document appears in client portal Documents hub
E2E: Generate a public share link for a document, open in incognito browser, verify download works without auth
E2E: Create KB article from template, publish with audience='client', verify it appears in client portal KB section with feedback buttons
E2E: Configure folder template as default, open new client Documents tab, verify folders auto-created from template
